Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enosh]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Enosh is a place to the west of Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — The heretics of Enosh fail to worship the Evening Star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Enosh is a place where Grandmasters reside and patrols extend south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Enosh is a free city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Enosh provides medical care and supplies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Enosh is a place from which Travelers originate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Enosh is a location where Travelers reside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Enosh is a city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — The Grandmasters' palace is located at the exact center of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Enosh is a destination for Alin and Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Enosh is gathering for war behind their Rising Sun.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Travelers Indirial fought were Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Enosh will try harder due to Indirial's failure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — There is a war being prepared against Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Enosh is a place where Naraka waypoints are controlled by Enosh Grandmasters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Enosh has walls that can be shattered by a golem army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Enosh is a city containing a Grandmasters’ palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon has a suite of rooms in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Golden hummingbirds are not considered a concern in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Enosh is a location containing an Enosh Grandmaster’s council-room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Enosh may have found the Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Alin assumed Simon had sided with Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Damascan Travelers might think Simon is working on the side of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Enosh has soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Enosh has no Travelers of the Ragnarus Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Enosh is a location/territory that the King intends to crush.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah had hoped to keep her identity secret to escape from Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin was practically conscripted by Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah planted a crystal in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Alin came to Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Enosh is a city that Simon overlooks from a stone outcropping after leaving Naraka.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Enosh can field almost as many Travelers as Leah's group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Enosh are aggressors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah was left in Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Enosh is a cult of the Incarnations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Enosh is a location from which Talos brought a strike force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Enosh is a location where Grandmaster Naraka was brought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Enosh is a location near Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Alin tells Simon not to take Ilana to Enosh.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Zakareth intended to crush Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Enosh is a city with walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Alin intends to protect Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Enosh is a city being reconstructed to replicate the layout of Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Enosh is a destination Leah is considering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Enosh is a location containing streets where corpses can be left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Enosh citizens live in the area Alin is inspecting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — The citizens of Enosh fear Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Enosh is a location where the Successor is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Enosh contains districts that send help to Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Enosh is a location containing an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Damasca's borders are secure from all but Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The King intends to lead the nine Territories against Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Leah and Simon plan to go back to Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Enosh is a city that Simon believes is lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Grandmaster Naraka's cackle was loud enough to shake the streets of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Enosh is a location the Ragnarus Incarnation intended to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Enosh contains the Violet District.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Enosh is a location that could fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Enosh is a place from which students can be taken for Elysia.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
